metadata.title: Thiago Queiroz | Software Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Thiago Queiroz - Software Engineer specialized in Back-end, Generative AI & LLM

hero.name: Thiago Queiroz
hero.description: Software Engineer with expertise in back-end development and Generative AI/LLM-based solutions. I build scalable APIs, data-driven pipelines, and implement patterns like RAG. Focused on code quality, scalability, and continuous delivery.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know my journey
about.bio_1: Software Engineer with expertise in back-end development and Generative AI/LLM-based solutions. I have solid experience building scalable APIs with Python/FastAPI, Django, and Java/Spring Boot.
about.bio_2: Currently working at PHOENIXX (Quebec, Canada) developing APIs and Azure services focused on data-driven solutions, automated pipelines, and AI-powered information extraction.
about.bio_3: Pursuing a Bachelor's in Software Engineering at UniCesumar and a Specialization in AI & Machine Learning at Future IT Valley. AWS Cloud Practitioner certified with experience in Azure and AWS.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk?
contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities, interesting projects, and connections. Don't hesitate to reach out!
